name: AI Code Analyzer
description: Analyze repositories with AI-powered code insights

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https:; connect-src 'self' https://api.your-domain.com
content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-same-origin; script-src 'self'; style-src 'unsafe-inline' 'self'
